member.name: T:BlockApp.App.Controls.BlockEntryTypeIconConverter
member.summary: Converts BlockEntryType to an emoji icon string.

member.name: T:BlockApp.App.Controls.NullToBoolConverter
member.summary: Returns true when the bound value is a non-null, non-empty string.

member.name: T:BlockApp.App.Controls.BlockReasonLabelConverter
member.summary: Converts BlockReason [Flags] enum to a Thai label string, e.g. "📵 โทรก่อกวน · 💸 หลอกโอนเงิน"

member.name: T:BlockApp.App.Controls.BlockReasonFlagConverter
member.summary: Returns true when the BlockReason value has the specific flag named by ConverterParameter.

member.name: T:BlockApp.App.Controls.BlockReasonChipsConverter
member.summary: Converts BlockReason [Flags] to List<string> — one chip per active flag.

member.name: T:BlockApp.App.Controls.HistoryActionLabelConverter
member.summary: Converts a HistoryAction enum to a human-readable Thai label string.

member.summary: เบอร์โทร หรือ เลขบัญชีธนาคาร

member.name: P:BlockApp.App.Models.HistoryEntry.Note
member.summary: หมายเหตุ / เหตุผลเพิ่มเติม

member.name: M:BlockApp.App.Services.BlocklistCacheService.Normalize(System.String)
member.summary: Normalize phone number to Thai local format (0xxxxxxxxx) for comparison. Strips spaces/dashes, converts +66 international to local format.

member.name: T:BlockApp.App.Resource
member.summary: Android Resource Designer class. Exposes the Android Resource designer assembly into the project Namespace.
